meaning: adj.涓夊崄鍊嶇殑adv.涓夊崄鍊嶅湴
examples: We've multiplied solar power more than thirtyfold.
After rising more than thirtyfold in 20 years, MCI's stock lost ground in 1994 and 1995.
Other backroom gains: Goodfellow's team reduced the "cost per well" by 22% in 2002 and has improved thirtyfold the quality and potency of compounds discovered since 1996.
It would be a thirtyfold cost reduction in seven years.
